creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've already prepared bison 3.7.2 update and fixes for all failures except electron (because it does not build on my box). Since devel/electron* has the same failure as www/qt5-webkit, I've sent the patch to maintainer (tagattie@FreeBSD.org) for testing.

I think the new patch is ready for another exp-run.
